site.title: Charis Barbosa - Digital and Graphic Designer
site.description: I'm a Digital & Graphic Designer with over 10 years of experience in branding and visual design. I'm currently expanding into web design and UI/UX, focusing on creating designs that are both clear and easy to use. I have a strong passion for typography and layout, and I enjoy crafting designs that are not only visually appealing but also highly functional. My goal is to create designs that effectively communicate the intended message while providing an enjoyable user experience.

intro.name: Charis Barbosa
intro.summary: a Digital & Graphic Designer with over 10 years of experience in branding and visual design, expanding into web design and UI/UX

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Charis, a Digital & Graphic Designer from Edmonton, Alberta.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: I find a lot of inspiration in nature. Being outside and noticing simple moments often influence how I approach color, calmness, and simplicity in my work.I’m also a mom, and that’s a big part of what motivates me to keep learning and improving.
about.approach: After working in graphic design for several years, I decided to go back to school. I’m currently studying Web Design and Development at NAIT, and that’s where I started getting interested in UI and UX. I’ve been learning how to think about design not just visually, but also how people use and experience it.
